evals.prompt: Generate a customer tracker dashboard for GResearch
evals.expected_output: Self-contained HTML intelligence dashboard at customers/g-research/trackers/YYYY-MM-DD-dashboard.html with ~84 issues across multiple themes, custom CSS bar charts (no Chart.js), working pill filters, collapsible theme sections with priority mini-badges, resolved toggle defaulting to hidden, sentiment panel, trending section, executive summary, audience toggle, and both light/dark mode support.

assertions.text: Output HTML file exists at customers/g-research/trackers/ with today's date
HTML file does not contain any Chart.js references (no 'chart.js', 'Chart(' or 'new Chart')
HTML file contains an INTELLIGENCE_DATA constant with customer set to GResearch or G-Research
HTML file uses custom CSS bar elements (bar-track, bar-segment classes) instead of canvas charts
HTML file contains pill filter buttons for Type, Status, and Priority
HTML file contains a resolved toggle button that defaults to hiding resolved issues
HTML file contains collapsible theme sections with priority mini-badges
HTML file contains prefers-color-scheme media query for light mode
HTML contains sentiment panel section (sentimentPanel element or renderSentimentPanel function)
HTML contains trending section (trendingCharts element or renderTrendingCharts function)
HTML contains exec summary section (execSummary element or renderExecSummary function)
HTML contains audience toggle (audience-toggle class or data-audience attribute)

evals.prompt: Build the tracker for a customer with no issues in Jira -- use 'NonexistentTestCorp' as the customer name
evals.expected_output: Self-contained HTML dashboard with empty state message, no errors, charts render gracefully with zero data, file saved to customers/nonexistent-test-corp/trackers/YYYY-MM-DD-dashboard.html.

assertions.text: Output HTML file exists at customers/nonexistent-test-corp/trackers/
HTML file renders without JS errors (no issues array is empty, charts handle zero data)

evals.prompt: I have a call with the Acme Corp team tomorrow, can you pull together a dashboard of their open Jira issues so I can prep?
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers from natural language (not /customer-snapshot command). Dashboard generated for Acme Corp at customers/acme-corp/trackers/YYYY-MM-DD-dashboard.html. Summary includes issue count, type breakdown, and top themes.

assertions.text: Skill was invoked despite not using /customer-snapshot command
Output HTML file exists at customers/acme-corp/trackers/

evals.prompt: Generate an intelligence dashboard for a customer not in customers.yaml -- use 'UnknownTestCorp'
evals.expected_output: Dashboard generates with Jira data only. Sentiment section shows 'Not configured' state. Trending and exec summary compute from issues only. No crashes.

assertions.text: HTML renders without errors despite missing Slack data
